title: Interstellar
description: When Earth becomes uninhabitable in the future, a farmer and ex-NASA pilot, Joseph Cooper, is tasked to pilot a spacecraft, along with a team of researchers, to find a new planet for humans.
fullDescription: In the year 2050, Earth is dying. A team of elite astronauts, led by Dr. Aris Thorne, embarks on humanity's last hope: a mission through a newly discovered wormhole to find a habitable planet. Their journey takes them across uncharted galaxies, facing cosmic phenomena and existential threats. As time dilates and resources dwindle, the crew must make impossible choices, balancing their personal sacrifices against the survival of the human race. This epic sci-fi adventure explores themes of hope, sacrifice, and the boundless human spirit.

title: 8 Body Problem
description: In a world where magic and technology collide, an ancient prophecy unfolds as chosen warriors rise to protect their realm from impending darkness.
fullDescription: Centuries after a cataclysmic event merged the realms of magic and advanced technology, the world of Aerth stands on the brink of a new war. An ancient prophecy speaks of the 'Shadow Blight' returning, and only a disparate group of individuals, each bearing a unique magical gift or technological prowess, can stand against it. Led by the enigmatic sorceress Lyra and the brilliant engineer Kael, they must unite the fractured kingdoms and uncover the secrets of their past to forge a future for Aerth.

title: Attack On Titan
description: Follow the journey of a young warrior who discovers an ancient sword that grants immense power, but at a cost that could change the fate of humanity.
fullDescription: In a realm plagued by demonic entities, young Kaito stumbles upon the legendary Spirit Blade, an artifact said to contain the souls of ancient heroes. Wielding its immense power, Kaito embarks on a perilous journey to master the blade and confront the encroaching darkness. But the blade demands a heavy toll, threatening to consume his very soul. Alongside a diverse group of allies, Kaito must fight not only for humanity's survival but also for his own.

title: Extraction
description: A powerful story of love, loss, and redemption as three generations of a family confront their past to heal their present and secure their future.
fullDescription: Spanning over sixty years, 'Echoes of the Heart' follows the intertwined lives of the Miller family. From the silent struggles of the matriarch during wartime to the modern-day challenges faced by her grandchildren, the film delves into the complexities of family bonds, unspoken secrets, and the enduring power of forgiveness. A poignant drama that explores how the echoes of the past resonate through generations, shaping destinies and offering a path to healing.

title: Avatar
description: An archaeologist's quest for a legendary civilization leads to the discovery of an ancient power that could either save or destroy our world.
fullDescription: Dr. Evelyn Reed, a brilliant but disgraced archaeologist, dedicates her life to finding the fabled Lost Kingdom of Eldoria. Her relentless pursuit leads her to a hidden temple, where she unearths an ancient power that could either usher in a new golden age or plunge the world into eternal darkness. Pursued by a shadowy organization seeking to exploit the power, Evelyn must race against time to understand and control the artifact before it falls into the wrong hands.
